message:
fix(combinator): saturating arithmetic in circuit_breaker, type fix in hedge

circuit_breaker.rs: Use saturating_add for failure counter, half-open
success counter, and sliding window counters to prevent u32 overflow
when thresholds are near u32::MAX. Previously, failures + 1 could
wrap to 0, preventing the circuit from ever opening.

hedge.rs: Fix pre-existing compile error where u64::min received a
usize argument on current nightly. Use try_from conversion for
cross-type min operation.

Validated via rch: cargo check --all-targets + circuit_breaker tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
